name: Mia Grand
description:
__Race:__ Dwarf
__Height:__ 180 cm (5'11")
__Affiliation:__ Hostess of Fertility • Freya Familia
__Level:__ 6

Mia Grand is the owner of the Hostess of Fertility, and is later revealed to be the former captain of the Freya Familia. Several years ago, Mia joined the Freya Familia because she owed Freya a favor, eventually becoming the captain of the Familia. When Ottar joined the Familia, Freya asked her to take care of him. Sometime before Ais came to Orario, Mia partially left the Freya Familia to open the Hostess of Fertility, employing Anya there.

As the proprietress of the Hostess of Fertility, she is strict both to her employees and customers alike. She doesn't tolerate any violence within the pub or slacking off by her employees and will punish any individuals accordingly, such as when she threatened Mord. Despite her rough personality, she is also shown to be kind, taking in girls with histories and protecting them. In addition, she likes money, telling Bell a couple of times to spend a lot of money.
